Never Miss a Government Tender Again

AI-powered tender matching that tells you which bids you actually qualify for. Get daily WhatsApp & email alerts. Save 20+ hours per week.

No credit card required • Free plan available • Setup in 2 minutes

Everything You Need to Win More Tenders

Stop manually checking portals. Let our AI do the heavy lifting.

Daily Auto-Scanning

We scrape GeM, CPPP, and state portals every morning at 6 AM so you don't have to.

AI Eligibility Matching

Our AI reads tender PDFs and tells you if you actually qualify before you waste hours.

WhatsApp Alerts

Get curated tender digests directly on WhatsApp with deadline reminders.

Email Digest

Detailed morning digest with all matching tenders, direct links, and summaries.

Pipeline Dashboard

Track applied, watching, and skipped tenders. Export to CSV anytime.

Multi-Portal Coverage

Central Government, State Portals, PSUs - all in one place.

How GovTender Scout Works

From scraping to your inbox in 4 simple steps

1

6:00 AM

We Scrape

Our bots scan GeM, CPPP, and 15+ state portals

2

6:30 AM

AI Analysis

Claude AI reads PDFs and extracts eligibility criteria

3

7:00 AM

Smart Matching

Your profile is matched against new tenders

4

8:00 AM

You Get Alerts

WhatsApp + email digest with qualified tenders
